# remnawave_hwid_stats (Data Source)

Returns HWID statistics from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_hwid_stats" "current" {}

output "hwid_stats" {
  value = data.remnawave_hwid_stats.current
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `response` (String) Raw JSON response from the panel's HWID stats endpoint.
